functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,16): error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,22): error TLUA1110: Type expected.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,23): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,24): error TLUA1005: ']' expected.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,26): error TLUA7051: Parameter has a name but no type. Did you mean 'arg1: number'?
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,32): error TLUA1005: ')' expected.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,33): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,35): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(1,42): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua(3,1): error TLUA2588: Cannot assign to 'f' because it is a constant.


==== functionTypeParameterNameFromTupleLabel.tlua (10 errors) ====
    declare f: (...args: [x: number]) => void;
                   ~~~~

                                      ~~

                                             ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.

    ~
!!! error TLUA2588: Cannot assign to 'f' because it is a constant.
